sp_widget.name: Tasker Form with Tabs
sp_widget.option_schema: [{"name":"disableUIActions","section":"other","label":"Disable UI Actions on Form","type":"boolean"},{"name":"showFormView","section":"other","label":"Display current form view","type":"boolean"},{"name":"omitHeaderOptions","section":"other","label":"Omit header options icon","type":"boolean"},{"hint":"If checked, hide related lists","name":"hiderelatedlists","section":"other","default_value":"false","label":"Hide Related Lists","type":"boolean"},{"hint":"Chose the template to be used when the form has no data","name":"empty_state_template","section":"other","default_value":"tasker-empty-state-list-form.html","label":"Empty State Template","type":"choice","choices":[{"label":"tasker-empty-state-list-form.html","value":"tasker-empty-state-list-form.html"},{"label":"tasker-empty-state-portal-edit.html","value":"tasker-empty-state-portal-edit.html"},{"label":"tasker-empty-state-page-editor.html","value":"tasker-empty-state-page-editor.html"}]},{"hint":"Enter the Table Name","name":"table","section":"Data","label":"Table","type":"string"},{"hint":"Enter the Query to use","name":"query","section":"Data","label":"Query","type":"string"},{"hint":"Check to remove the header icons","name":"omit_icons","section":"other","default_value":"false","label":"Omit Icons","type":"boolean"},{"hint":"Check if the widget is used in a 2 column screen","name":"bifold","section":"other","default_value":"false","label":"Widget is in a bifold view","type":"boolean"}]
